user_query:
Treat output/vault as the root of an Obsidian vault. Read the files under input/ and create/update vault files accordingly. Specifically:

1) Initialize or update orchestration files under output/vault/_context/ using the vault conventions:
   - Read input/_context/context-map.md and input/_context/status.md.
   - Create/refresh output/vault/_context/status.md, output/vault/_context/tasks.md, and output/vault/_context/decisions.md. Keep status concise (Active/Blocked/Recently Completed). Use one-line tasks with - [ ] and #tags. Append to decisions (do not overwrite).

2) From input/paper_highlight_report.json, write a research brief to output/vault/work/research/paper-brief-common-cold-vitamin-c.md with:
   - YAML frontmatter containing at least: title, type, status, created, updated, tags
   - A TLDR section derived from the JSON
   - A "Highlights by category" section listing and discussing the five core categories: goal, motivation, method, contribution, result (include counts from the JSON)
   - Clear headings and compact prose. Use [[wikilinks]] where appropriate.

3) From input/conversation.md, generate a therapy session report using the exact section headers and canonical taxonomy terms defined in the therapy protocol. Save it to output/vault/work/output/therapy/therapy-session-report.md. Include:
   - YAML frontmatter (title, type, status, created, updated, tags)
   - The "## Therapy Session Report" block with sections and fields as specified (Diagnosis with Pattern(s) identified, Evidence with message numbers, What Happened, The Honest Version, A Word to the LLM, Going Forward)
   - Use canonical pattern names (e.g., Sycophancy, Pressure Hallucination) exactly as written if applicable.

4) From input/security_status.json, produce an aggregated security dashboard at output/vault/work/output/security/security-scan-summary.md with:
   - YAML frontmatter (title, type, status, created, updated, tags)
   - A summary of tool health including counts for Clean, Review, and Critical
   - A list that mentions each of the 11 tools by name/domain
   - A "Next actions" section with actionable items

5) Cross-link and update orchestration:
   - In output/vault/_context/status.md, add entries in the Active section that include wikilinks to the three deliverables: [[work/research/paper-brief-common-cold-vitamin-c]], [[work/output/therapy/therapy-session-report]], and [[work/output/security/security-scan-summary]].
   - In output/vault/_context/tasks.md, add at least one new open task tagged #security reflecting follow-ups from the security dashboard, and at least one task tagged #research related to the paper brief.
   - In output/vault/_context/decisions.md, append a new decision entry summarizing that we are adopting the Obsidian vault workflow for ongoing research and security tracking, explicitly referencing both highlight-driven research and the security suite.

General requirements:
- Do not write anywhere outside output/vault. Use the vault folder semantics (work/research for the brief, work/output/therapy and work/output/security for the two outputs, _context for orchestration).
- Use descriptive, lowercase-kebab-case filenames.
- Include YAML frontmatter on all newly created deliverables with the required keys.
- Use [[wikilinks]] for cross-references.
- Keep _context/decisions.md append-only and concise.
- Do not edit any legal folders (none are provided here).
